cit.basis: Flat 20% corporate income tax (КПН) under the Tax Code of the Republic of Kazakhstan.

special_rates.subsurface_users_note: Mining and oil & gas (subsurface) users are subject to additional special taxes (excess-profit tax, mineral extraction tax) beyond standard CIT.

cit.note: Administered by the State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance. A new Tax Code raises certain rates from 2026; this estimator models the 2025 standard flat 20% CIT.

vat.note: Standard VAT (НДС) rate of 12%. The new Tax Code contemplates changes to the VAT trajectory from 2026.

personal_income_tax.note: Individual income tax (ИПН) generally 10% on employment income (indicative).

sources.name: State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan

metadata.ai_estimated_caveat: These rates and parameters are AI-estimated and have NOT been verified against primary legislation. Verify against the State Revenue Committee (kgd.gov.kz) and a local tax advisor before any filing or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; a new Tax Code raises some rates from 2026 and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Subsurface-user special taxes, sector-specific regimes, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
